raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I recieved an email from CitiBank that a Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX was approved under my name, with a {$9400.00} credit limit. I did not authorize, or apply for a credit card through Citi, and it was clear to me that someone opened a credit card under my name and idenity. After this, I started getting calls and emails from Citi that I had an overdue balance on a credit card. I called them and spoke with a representitive, and throught I went through the process of filing for fraud. Back in XX/XX/year>, the representitive agreed that it was not me who opened the card. After that phone call, I continued to recieve calls from Citi, saying that I have an unpaid balance. Over the last 8 months I have called Citi multiple times trying to get this resolved. In XX/XX/year> I spoke with a representitive who assured me it was taken care of, and that I should ignore any future emails as their system may not have caught up. However three months later I am still recieving emails that I have an unpaid balance. I filed for fraud again in XXXX, however there still has been no resulution, and I am still recieving late payment notices.I also do not have any access to the account since I did not create it, and only know the last 4 digits of the account which is XXXX.
